title: ferray-linalg: einsum generic contraction is O(product of all dims) — no opt_einsum-style optimization
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's einsum supports optimize=True (and optimize='greedy'/'optimal') which uses the opt_einsum library to find the optimal contraction order for multi-operand expressions. This can turn O(n^5) into O(n^3) for chained contractions. ferray's einsum has an optimizer module that detects matmul/tensordot shortcuts for 2-operand cases, but for 3+ operands it falls through to generic_contraction which iterates over the full Cartesian product of indices. Add contraction path optimization for multi-operand einsum.
